steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage shows an essay questioning photography as fine art and presenting a specific claim: that photograph value is informational rather than creative. The blank verb must express making this firm claim.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
”Asserted” means to state or declare firmly—ideal for presenting a position in an argumentative essay.

The other three suggest either uncovering hidden wrongdoing (exposed), identifying empirical facts (discovered), or expressing doubt (doubted), none of which fit this definitive argumentative stance.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
